items.user_turn: Please use the $420 savings to create a revised day-by-day spending plan and an exportable expense tracker for my three-week Southeast Asia trip. My total budget is USD 3,200 per person (that includes the $420). Travel dates are 2026-07-01 to 2026-07-21. My Chiang Mai guesthouse is already booked—I can share the host phone number and booking reference if you need to check change or refund windows. I’m a vegetarian with gluten intolerance; my top activities are cooking classes and temple visits, and I usually spend modestly on street food but may splurge on one or two special experiences. Please include concrete recommendations for reallocating the $420, which bookings to prioritize or change, and a short checklist of immediate bookings/actions to take.
